Document:
# Skill & Spell System
The Skill and Spell System defines how characters learn and use abilities. Skills are organized in trees, and each skill grants spells or stat bonuses when learned.
## What This Section Covers
- [textlink="Skill Trees & Distribution" link="OE14_DEV_Skills_Trees"] — point allocation and tree progression - [textlink="Spell Mechanics" link="OE14_DEV_Skills_Mechanics"] — how spells are cast, their effects, and resolution - [textlink="Mana System" link="OE14_DEV_Skills_Mana"] — mana pools, costs, and regeneration - [textlink="Creating Custom Skills" link="OE14_DEV_Skills_Custom"] — step-by-step guide to adding new skills
## Key Concepts
- Skills are defined in YAML prototypes - Each skill is part of a tree (e.g., Pyromancy, Hydrosophistry, Craftsmanship) - Skills have tiers: T1 (basic) to T3 (advanced) - Learning a skill costs character points - Some skills grant stat modifiers in addition to spells
## Key Files
- [mono]Resources/Prototypes/_OE14/Skills/[/mono] - [mono]Content.Shared/_OE14/Skills/OE14SkillComponent.cs[/mono] - [mono]Content.Server/_OE14/Skills/OE14SkillSystem.cs[/mono]
